message:
feat(fwc): add replayability awareness to config get/export dispatches

Config snapshots from fcp-host may contain redacted secrets, making them
non-replayable as replacement documents. The get and export dispatches now
detect this via is_replayable() and adjust user-facing messages and
next_actions accordingly, preventing operators from accidentally importing
a sanitized snapshot as a full config replacement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
